title: daviesia major
intro: Daviesia major, also known as bitter pea or bitter bush, is a plant species native to Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system. Daviesia major can be prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
